sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62525" key="lepto/ramfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεπτό-ραμφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62525.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having a slender bill</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στρουθίον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.45</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
